data.title: Applied Intuition launches first mobile operations center for autonomous systems: Applied Edge
data.description: A leading physical AI company, Applied Intuition, Inc., has introduced a new platform designed for field deployment and persistent autonomy development and operations. The mobile operations center, revealed in SUNNYVALE, Calif., on March 31, 2026, is the first of its kind and aimed at facilitating the development and testing processes.

data.title: South Seas purchases Rauschenberg property on Captiva
data.description: In Captiva Island, Florida, on March 31, 2026, South Seas has proudly revealed the completion of its acquisition of a 22-acre piece of land previously held by the Robert Rauschenberg Foundation. This expansive property stretches from the shoreline to the bay on Captiva Island. South Seas finalized the purchase from the Foundation, marking a significant transaction in the region.

data.title: NFTYDoor Appoints Leo Loomie as Chief Revenue Officer to Drive National Expansion of Home Equity Lending Platform
data.description: Leo Loomie, a seasoned fintech and financial services leader, has recently been appointed to oversee revenue growth, partner experience, and distribution strategy at NFTYDoor, a prominent company based in McLean, Virginia. Loomie brings with him an extensive background in the industry, with significant expertise in driving business growth and enhancing partnerships. His role will be crucial in advancing the company's market position and ensuring sustainable revenue generation.

data.title: Once valued at $4 billion, Allbirds, popular in Silicon Valley, sold for $39 million due to difficulty expanding customer base.
data.description: The company, which was valued at $4 billion in the past, faced challenges in gaining a significant customer following and achieving profitability. The company specialized in producing sneakers using Merino wool but encountered difficulties in attracting a large market audience.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Dr. William R Harbron as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Dover, New Hampshire, Dr. William R. Harbron was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant achievements in Coaching and Consulting. Dr. Harbron has made noteworthy contributions to his field and is acknowledged for his distinguished career.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Amy Dobbs as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence
data.description: Amy Dobbs has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence for her exceptional contributions to Client Focused Leadership in Utah's real estate industry. The accolade was announced in The Inner Circle on March 31, 2026. Amy Dobbs, a trusted real estate professional, continues to excel in her field with her dedication to providing top-notch services to clients.

data.title: IQST - IQSTEL Inc. Announces Investor Conference Call to Discuss Q4 2025 and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: IQSTEL Inc. (NASDAQ: IQST), a global telecommunications and technology company, is set to reveal its strategic expansion into digital health as a new high-growth vertical. The company is rapidly growing and will be hosting an investor conference call to discuss this initiative. This move marks an important step for IQSTEL as it aims to tap into the lucrative digital health sector. The conference call will provide key insights into the company's plans, and interested parties can learn more about this development.

data.title: Oil Tumbles, Nasdaq 100 Jumps 3% As Iran Says It's Ready To Halt Hostilities: 10 Stocks Moving
data.description: WTI crude oil fell by 2% to $100 per barrel following Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian's announcement that the Islamic Republic is willing to end the war, contingent on guarantees from the United States. This optimistic statement resulted in a surge in equities during early afternoon trading on Tuesday. The Nasdaq 100, tracked by the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ: QQQ), saw a remarkable 3.2% increase, marking its most substantial rally since May 2025. Additionally, the S&P 500 continued its upward trend with a 2.6% gain, while the Russell 2000 climbed by 2.9%. The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) also experienced a significant drop of 14.4% to 26.20, eliminating a substantial portion of its March premium as investors began shedding hedges built up during weeks of uncertainty in the Middle East. The markets saw a strong surge in airlines, clean energy, and growth stocks as a result of the ceasefire signal, prompting an aggressive rotation during the trading session.

data.title: FDA Warns Of Fatal Liver Risks Linked To Amgen Tavneos Use
data.description: The FDA has issued a warning regarding severe and sometimes deadly liver injuries associated with Amgen Inc.'s drug Tavneos (avacopan). Postmarketing data revealed new safety concerns not previously observed in clinical trials. Tavneos, which received approval in October 2021, is prescribed alongside glucocorticoids and other medications for the treatment of severe active ANCA-associated vasculitis in adults. The FDA highlighted the emergence of a new safety signal related to the drug, with reported cases of drug-induced liver injury (DILI), including vanishing bile duct syndrome (VBDS), a rare yet serious condition involving progressive bile duct destruction. This development underscores the importance of closely monitoring patients using Tavneos.

data.title: Fever-Tree Expands Pineapple Ginger Beer and Mojito Mix Availability Nationwide
data.description: A popular premium mixer brand is broadening the availability of its Pineapple Ginger Beer and Classic Mojito Mix across retailers throughout the country. Fever-Tree's Pineapple Ginger Beer and Mojito will soon be more widely accessible, with Pineapple Ginger Beer being distributed to more locations this Spring. This expansion will introduce these tropical-inspired flavors to a larger audience, with the products becoming available across the nation.

data.title: Just 1 in 57 Crypto Owners Globally Pay Taxes on Their Holdings, New Report Finds
data.description: A recent report by Divly, a crypto tax calculator, revealed that just 1.76% of investors worldwide disclose their digital asset holdings to tax authorities. This significant lack of compliance poses risks for millions of investors. Emerging frameworks such as 1099-DA, DAC8, and CARF are enhancing transparency. The data was released in Stockholm on March 31st.
